category_sources: Official Babraham Bioinformatics FastQC page identifies it as a sequence-data quality-control project.
source_facts.description says FastQC is a quality-control tool for high-throughput sequence data.
display_name_sources: Official Babraham Bioinformatics project page uses the FastQC name.
Official GitHub repository is named s-andrews/FastQC.
docs_sources: Official Babraham FastQC Help path provides module/user documentation.
Official Babraham FastQC project page is the primary project documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official FastQC source repository is s-andrews/FastQC on GitHub and matches the Babraham project name.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies high-throughput sequence-data quality control.
source_facts.executables lists fastqc as a command-line executable.
